prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the regulatory judgment of Torus62 Limited, a social housing provider operating in Liverpool, St Helens, and Warrington, which are all located in England. The standards and assessments discussed are relevant to the governance and consumer standards in the English housing sector.
